title: aiwargames
description: AI War Games is a hands-on AI red teaming and agentic security training platform that helps teams discover vulnerabilities in LLM and agent-based systems through guided adversarial missions, interactive sandbox testing, attack replay, and defense-oriented learning.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for Agentic Apps 2026

items: Map red scenarios to blue controls
